source_rationale: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) on these later passages revealed near homogenous cell populations with fibroblast-like marker genes for PAT-52, PAT-54, PAT-63, and PAT-68, whereas PAT-73 and PAT-03 showed fewer fibroblast-like features, consistent with our spectral observations (Extended Data Figure 4).
